_meta.note: Add objects to 'items' to show a project in the 'Projects in Progress' section — mirror any change in the .fr.json file. status: 'coming-soon' | 'in-development'. progress: 0-100. slug is currently informational only (no dedicated case-study page).

items.name: Mideni Trade (IA Trader)
items.description: An autonomous crypto-trading platform with a live control-center dashboard: Binance market data, indicators, a signal scanner, and a real-time event feed. M1 (data pipeline + dashboard) is complete; the decision committee and risk/execution engine land in M2, followed by ML and backtesting.
